rulings.Case Title: MARIAN B MOHR VS. EAST WEST BANK A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Defendant East West Banks (Amended)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 19, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED. Triable issues of fact exists regarding the statute of limitations, permanency of waste, diminution in value, and assumption of liabilities. Additionally Defendant's federal law argument is based on an unpled defense and Defendant failed to shift its burden and show that it is applicable under the circumstances of this case. Agri-Export Co-op. v. Universal Sav. Ass'n. (1991) 767 F.Supp. 824. Plaintiff to prepare proposed order in compliance with CCP 437c(g) . The order shall also include rulings on the evidentiary objections relevant to the applicable material facts. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRIS NORRIS ET AL VS. CALIBER HOME LOANS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 19, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT CALIBER HOME LOANS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the cause of action for quiet title for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of this cause of action and to allege tender. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Causes of action for breach of contract and fraud are sufficiently alleged.= (501/REQ)
